keys.title: Passcode
keys.changeConfirmPrompt: Enter new passcode again to confirm
keys.rememberDevice: Remember this device (check only on personal PC)
keys.resetFailed: Invalid or expired link. Request a new one.
keys.resetInvalidLink: Invalid or expired link. Please request a new passcode reset.
keys.forgotPrompt: Enter your email to receive a link to reset your passcode.
keys.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for that email, we sent a reset link. Check your inbox.
keys.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again from the start.
keys.resetExpiryNotice: This link expires in 15 minutes. If it has expired, request a new reset link from the sign-in page.
keys.resetLinkExpiryAndRateLimit: The link expires in 15 minutes. If you don't receive an email, check spam or try again later.
keys.rateLimitNotice: Too many requests. Please try again in a few minutes.
